workflow: One generation per asset; spaceship generated on flat chroma-key green, locally matted and despilled; runtime outputs optimized as WebP.

ship.prompt: Original top-down graphite and silver FLIPSTRIKE interceptor formed from two flipper-like wings, cyan energy core, restrained amber and magenta details, crisp small-scale silhouette, no weapons fire, text, logo, or scenery.

backgrounds.foundry: Deep-space orbital forge with molten amber reactors, chrome rings, and cyan conduits framing a dark play lane.
backgrounds.transit: Violet and cyan prism hyperspace rails and crystalline portals framing a dark vertical play lane.
backgrounds.abyss: Black-hole magnetic abyss with obsidian rings and turquoise energy arcs framing open space.
backgrounds.furnace: Ruptured sun and orbital furnace refinery with orange vents and dark ceramic machinery.
backgrounds.citadel: Monumental crystal-and-graphite space citadel with a white prismatic reactor and crimson energy channels.

constraints: Portrait 9:16 stages keep the center and lower third clear for the ship and projectiles; no text, logos, watermarks, ships, enemies, or projectiles in stage art.
